'''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.7 (3.10.0-1062.1.1.el7) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.7 (3.10.0-1062.1.1.el7) *SLES12 SP4 (4.12.14-95.29.1) *Ubuntu 18.04 (4.15.0-64) '''Recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
*v1.45.2.wc1 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.12.X == Issues fixed between 2.12.0 and 2.13.0 == ''' New Feature ''' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-1365 LU-1365]: Implement ldiskfs LARGEDIR support for e2fsprogs *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9846 LU-9846]: Overstriping - more than 1 stripe per OST per component *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10070 LU-10070]: PFL self-extending file layout *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10092 LU-10092]: PCC: Lustre Persistent Client Cache *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11297 LU-11297]: Align LNet routing with Multi-Rail and LNet health *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11376 LU-11376]: Special file/dir to represent DAOS Containers *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12624 LU-12624]: striped directory allocate stripes by QoS *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12734 LU-12734]: bash completion (for now: lctl set/get_param) ''' Improvement ''' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-1538 LU-1538]: cleanup test scripts *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-2233 LU-2233]: sanityn/40-46 takes ~800-900s *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-7004 LU-7004]: fix "lctl set_param -P" to allow deprecation of "lctl conf_param" *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8207 LU-8207]: Add auto-stripe option to lfs_migrate *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8434 LU-8434]: Rewrite test framework using Python *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8939 LU-8939]: nodemap: remove deprecated lproc files *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8955 LU-8955]: Send SELinux policy info to server *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9010 LU-9010]: use static initialization for statically allocated objects when possible *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9625 LU-9625]: remove "lfs ls" and "lfs cp" and references *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9629 LU-9629]: lfs migrate does not work as a non-root user *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10258 LU-10258]: lfs mirror command to open fd on component *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10885 LU-10885]: enable flock by default *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11010 LU-11010]: Remove call to ‘return’ after call to ‘skip’ in Lustre test suites *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11011 LU-11011]: checksum type can not be selected permanently *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11022 LU-11022]: FLR1.5: "lfs mirror" usability for Burst Buffer *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11041 LU-11041]: enable build and test with kernel debug options *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11078 LU-11078]: customise run_ior() *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11089 LU-11089]: Performance improvements for lu_object locking *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11213 LU-11213]: DNE3: remote mkdir() in ROOT/ by default *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11221 LU-11221]: Do not hold pages locked for network IO on the server. *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11233 LU-11233]: gcc8 support *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11285 LU-11285]: don't stop on the first blocked lock in ldlm_reprocess_queue() *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11296 LU-11296]: page cache cleanup improvement on lock flush *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11329 LU-11329]: add get_maintainer.pl script from kernel *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11355 LU-11355]: Add Lustre trim support *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11367 LU-11367]: integrate LSOM with lfs find *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11398 LU-11398]: clean up ptlrpc completion callbacks *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11408 LU-11408]: propagate grant shrink interval immediately *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11415 LU-11415]: ksocklnd performance improvement on 40Gbps ethernet *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11456 LU-11456]: MDT can skip sync if the object is synced yet *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11462 LU-11462]: osd-zfs can skip object sync if it's not dirty *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11467 LU-11467]: FLR1.5: add "lfs mirror delete" command *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11504 LU-11504]: improve ha.sh to trigger lfsck after/during failover/failback *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11526 LU-11526]: Support 64MB I/O RPC *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11555 LU-11555]: warn when mounting ZFS pools without "multihost" enabled *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11606 LU-11606]: use llapi_error() for errors in liblustreapi files *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11616 LU-11616]: Optimize handling statahead delay *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11673 LU-11673]: Correct shell issues/mistakes in Lustre test suites *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11717 LU-11717]: t-f:exit_status () defect: test returns code 1 if log contains "FAIL" *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11736 LU-11736]: Do not apply bulk IO tuning on MDT or MGT devices *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11739 LU-11739]: Don't inherit default layout from root for new subdirectories *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11810 LU-11810]: allow "Fixes:" tag in commit message signoff block *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11811 LU-11811]: Provide an interface to set Lustre MDT into readonly mode *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11820 LU-11820]: reduce conf-sanity test duration *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11830 LU-11830]: Quiet compiler warnings on ARM *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11834 LU-11834]: config instance truncation due to buffer size mismatch *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11838 LU-11838]: Support linux kernel version 4.18 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11843 LU-11843]: customise sanity-quota to work with project quotas set before the suite *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11845 LU-11845]: Support encrypted ZFS volumes *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11852 LU-11852]: osc cache waiters wakeups and skipping queue *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11876 LU-11876]: Lustre dkms packages missing build dependency *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11885 LU-11885]: reset quota setting upon test failed *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11902 LU-11902]: Remove obsolete lustre-utils files and entries for DEB packages *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11913 LU-11913]: mq-deadline should be in the list of allowed schedulers *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11914 LU-11914]: Build error for l_getsepol.c due to missing openssl/evp.h *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11923 LU-11923]: meta_bg conflicts with resize_inode if explicitly specified for a small filesystem *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11924 LU-11924]: Combine cancellation of llog records at osp_sync_process_committed *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11963 LU-11963]: Add nonrotational flag to obd_statfs *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11974 LU-11974]: Improve llapi_layout_get_by_xattr() *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11982 LU-11982]: Incorrect text in lfs migrate help *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11999 LU-11999]: DNE performance improvement *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12015 LU-12015]: Update Changelog for ubuntu kernel version
